# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  nsgName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: dev-team-nsg
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Network Security Group
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the NSG resource
  allowedSourceIpRanges:
    type: array
    metadata:
      description: Array of specific IP ranges or CIDR blocks allowed to access the VMs
    minLength: 1
  enableRdp:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Enable RDP access (port 3389) - Windows VMs only
  enableSsh:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable SSH access (port 22) - Linux VMs
  enableHttp:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: false
    metadata:
      description: Enable HTTP access (port 80) - Use HTTPS instead when possible
  enableHttps:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
    metadata:
      description: Enable HTTPS access (port 443)
  logAnalyticsWorkspaceId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Log Analytics Workspace ID for NSG flow logs and diagnostics
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
    apiVersion: 2023-05-01
    name: "[parameters('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules: "[concat(if(parameters('enableSsh'), variables('sshRules'), createArray()), if(parameters('enableRdp'), variables('rdpRules'), createArray()), if(parameters('enableHttps'), variables('httpsRules'), createArray()), if(parameters('enableHttp'), variables('httpRules'), createArray()), variables('denyAllInboundRule'))]"
    tags:
      Environment: Production
      ManagedBy: Infrastructure-Team
      SecurityLevel: Restricted
      ComplianceRequired: true
  - type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/providers/diagnosticSettings
    apiVersion: 2021-05-01-preview
    name: "[concat(parameters('nsgName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/nsg-diagnostics')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
    properties:
      workspaceId: "[parameters('logAnalyticsWorkspaceId')]"
      logs:
        - category: NetworkSecurityGroupEvent
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
        - category: NetworkSecurityGroupRuleCounter
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
variables:
  sshRules: [
    {
      name: Allow-SSH-Inbound
      properties: {
        description: SSH access for remote development team from approved IP ranges only
        protocol: Tcp
        sourcePortRange: "*"
        destinationPortRange: "22"
        sourceAddressPrefixes: "[parameters('allowedSourceIpRanges')]"
        destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
        access: Allow
        priority: 1000
        direction: Inbound
      }
    }
  ]
  rdpRules: [
    {
      name: Allow-RDP-Inbound
      properties: {
        description: RDP access for remote development team from approved IP ranges only
        protocol: Tcp
        sourcePortRange: "*"
        destinationPortRange: "3389"
        sourceAddressPrefixes: "[parameters('allowedSourceIpRanges')]"
        destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
        access: Allow
        priority: 1100
        direction: Inbound
      }
    }
  ]
  httpsRules: [
    {
      name: Allow-HTTPS-Inbound
      properties: {
        description: HTTPS access for web applications from approved IP ranges
        protocol: Tcp
        sourcePortRange: "*"
        destinationPortRange: "443"
        sourceAddressPrefixes: "[parameters('allowedSourceIpRanges')]"
        destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
        access: Allow
        priority: 1200
        direction: Inbound
      }
    }
  ]
  httpRules: [
    {
      name: Allow-HTTP-Inbound
      properties: {
        description: HTTP access - Consider using HTTPS instead for security
        protocol: Tcp
        sourcePortRange: "*"
        destinationPortRange: "80"
        sourceAddressPrefixes: "[parameters('allowedSourceIpRanges')]"
        destinationAddressPrefix: VirtualNetwork
        access: Allow
        priority: 1300
        direction: Inbound
      }
    }
  ]
  denyAllInboundRule: [
    {
      name: Deny-All-Other-Inbound
      properties: {
        description: Explicit deny all other inbound traffic - least privilege principle
        protocol: "*"
        sourcePortRange: "*"
        destinationPortRange: "*"
        sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
        destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        access: Deny
        priority: 4096
        direction: Inbound
      }
    }
  ]
outputs:
  nsgId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
  nsgName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('nsgName')]"
